description: The e-commerce platform is experiencing 502 Bad Gateway errors during deployments because pods terminate instantly, before the load balancer can deregister them. Configure the 'payment-processor', 'cart-service', and 'order-worker' deployments in the 'ecommerce' namespace with the preStop lifecycle hooks and terminationGracePeriodSeconds specified in /home/ga/Desktop/drain_spec.md. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
